extract: Hawlucha (Japanese: ルチャブル Luchabull) is a dual-type Fighting/Flying Pokémon introduced in Generation VI. While it is not known to evolve into or from any other Pokémon, Hawlucha can Mega Evolve into Mega Hawlucha using the Hawluchanite. Mega Hawlucha was introduced in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.
